project_type: Self-Evolving AI Development Kernel - Python orchestration system that assembles prompts and executes an LLM-driven development workflow via a state machine graph
build_system: pytest with coverage, no build step needed
test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures using tmp_path, tmp_knowledge, tmp_memory, tmp_state, tmp_graph
verification_instructions: Run python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov --cov-fail-under=90 -q and confirm all tests pass with coverage >= 90%
environment_constraints: Python 3.12 only, dependencies: pyyaml, pytest, pytest-cov. No Docker. No external APIs.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass after each round, coverage >= 90%. Constitution (constitution.md), BOOT.md, and runner.py are considered immutable by evolution engine but we can modify them as part of fixing the system. Each round must be committed separately.
key_patterns: Classes follow single-responsibility: StateManager (state persistence), GraphExecutor (graph navigation), KnowledgeStore (knowledge CRUD), SkillComposer (skill composition), EvolutionEngine (kernel evolution), ContextAssembler (prompt assembly), Reflector (iteration analysis). Tests use pytest classes grouped by functionality. Each module has docstrings and type hints. YAML for data files, JSONL for append-only logs.
directory_structure: Root: runner.py (entry point), kernel/ (BOOT.md, constitution.md, graph.yaml, prompts/, evolution/, philosophy/, context_assembler.py, graph_executor.py, reflector.py, bootstrap.py), knowledge/ (store.py, skill_composer.py, skills/_index.yaml), memory/ (state_manager.py), tests/ (conftest.py + test files)
